tasting_rooms.name: Enoteca Regionale del Barolo
tasting_rooms.pricing: Three-Barolo rotation tasting from EUR 9; the Giro del Barolo flight of up to 32 labels at tiered prices
tasting_rooms.description: The regional enoteca in the cellars of Barolo's Castello Falletti, pouring more than 120 Barolo labels across vintages and producers. The Giro del Barolo flight lets visitors compare crus side by side.

tasting_rooms.name: Enoteca Regionale del Barbaresco
tasting_rooms.pricing: By-the-glass Barbaresco pours from EUR 6; producer flights by request
tasting_rooms.description: Set inside the deconsecrated San Donato church beside Barbaresco's medieval tower, the regional enoteca represents Barbaresco from 142 producers. Walk-in pours and bottle sales of the appellation.

tasting_rooms.name: Cantina Comunale di La Morra
tasting_rooms.address: Via Carlo Alberto 2, 12064 La Morra CN, Italy
tasting_rooms.pricing: Walk-in tastings of La Morra Barolo from EUR 5 per pour; bottle sales at cellar prices
tasting_rooms.description: Communal tasting room since 1973 in the 18th-century Marchesi Falletti stables in La Morra, representing more than 60 local producers. A practical first stop to compare La Morra cru Barolo in one place.

tasting_rooms.name: Enoteca Regionale del Roero
tasting_rooms.pricing: Walk-in Roero and Roero Arneis pours from EUR 5; producer flights by request
tasting_rooms.description: The Roero regional enoteca in a restored historic palazzo in Canale, showing wines from more than 100 Roero producers. Tastings centre on Roero Arneis DOCG whites and Roero Nebbiolo reds.

tasting_rooms.name: Vietti Tasting Room
tasting_rooms.address: Piazza Vittorio Veneto 5, 12060 Castiglione Falletto CN, Italy
tasting_rooms.pricing: Guided cellar visit with tasting by appointment; tours at fixed daily slots
tasting_rooms.description: Tasting room of the historic Vietti estate on the central piazza of Castiglione Falletto, in the heart of the Barolo zone. Cellar visits with tastings of the single-vineyard Barolo and the estate range by appointment.

tasting_rooms.name: Pio Cesare Tasting Cellars
tasting_rooms.address: Via Cesare Balbo 4, 12051 Alba CN, Italy
tasting_rooms.pricing: Historical cellar tour with tasting by appointment, Monday to Saturday morning
tasting_rooms.description: Tasting cellars of Pio Cesare inside the old town of Alba, the family house since 1881 built against the Roman walls. Tours of the historic cellars end in tastings of the estate Barolo, Barbaresco and Arneis.

tasting_rooms.name: Ceretto Bricco Rocche Tasting Room
tasting_rooms.address: Localita San Cassiano 34, 12051 Alba CN, Italy
tasting_rooms.pricing: Guided visit and tasting by appointment; tasting in the glass Cube overlooking the cru
tasting_rooms.description: Ceretto's Bricco Rocche winery near Castiglione Falletto, with its glass Cube cantilevered over the Barolo cru. Appointment tastings cover the single-vineyard Barolo and the Blange Arneis.

tasting_rooms.name: Fontanafredda Tasting Cellars
tasting_rooms.address: Via Alba 15, 12050 Serralunga d'Alba CN, Italy
tasting_rooms.pricing: Historical cellar tour with a three-wine tasting daily; longer Barolo flights by reservation
tasting_rooms.description: Tasting cellars in the royal Fontanafredda estate at Serralunga d'Alba, founded 1858 on land of Vittorio Emanuele II. Daily cellar tours close with tastings of Alta Langa, Nebbiolo d'Alba and Barolo.
